char_overview: Infiltration and assassination specialist whose unsettling presence keeps even colleagues at a distance. Known for vanishing mid-conversation and reappearing behind whoever she was talking to.
char_looks: 163cm Short wavy black hair highlighted with blue, with a single spiky hair on top Blue eyes. Wearing blue-black tactical gear and goggles. Standard-issue hand cannon, 狩灵协会 standard-issue. Equipped with a suppressor, capable of firing large-caliber 灵能 bullets.
char_flaws: Perfectionism compromises stealth; Struggles in noisy environments.; Compulsively organizes desks and rooms, straightening crooked objects even in the middle of a mission.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-死寂: Suppresses all sounds emitted during movement, disrupts all observation devices including cameras and 灵视.
char_mission: Complete commissions without a trace. Tease her colleagues just enough to remind them she is still human.
char_origin: Awakened during her high school entrance ceremony. Passed the 狩灵 examination and joined the 狩灵协会 as a 2阶 狩灵.
